title: verbascum × subcheiranthifolium
intro: Verbascum × subcheiranthifolium, a hybrid plant species belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family, is a perennial flowering plant known for its medicinal and ornamental value. The plant is valued for its expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Verbascum × subcheiranthifolium include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
